DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/CLERK:G.SHULL: C/C SETTLEMENT CONF. ATNY CLIFFORD HANSEN PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT THALIA HERNANDEZ PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE NOT SETTLED. DEFT APPEARED WITHOUT JURY INSTRUCTIONS; JURY DEMAND STRICKEN BY COURT AFTER SETTL CONF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDES, THALIA MARITSA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 704 BUSH #408, STAYED UNTIL DEC-12-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59 PM.
